Product.Name: 017314 BRACKEN II EXTREME 3 IN 1 WATERPROOF JACKET
Product.Description:
Our Bracken Extreme Mens 3 in 1 Waterproof Jacket is a stylish and versatile piece, with a detachable inner softshell and durable waterproof outer. It has multiple zipped pockets to safely carry the essentials and an adjustable fit for increased protection from the rain.
This is a great piece for changeable weather conditions.

  • Waterproof - Tested to 10,000mm, suitable for heavy rain
  • Breathable - The fabric allows perspiration to pass out of the garment, keeping you cool and comfortable. Rated at 5,000g
  • Extreme - Our high performance Extreme range brings you waterproof, breathable and stylish designs exclusively from Mountain Warehouse
  • 3 In 1 Jacket - Wear three ways, outer waterproof shell, inner warm lightweight jacket and both together for waterproof & warmth
  • IsoDry - Waterproof & breathable membrane allows moisture out & prevents rain getting in
  • Taped Seams - All seams are taped to make this item fully waterproof
  • Softshell - A woven combination material, designed to be breathable and flexible with some showerproof properties
  • Mesh Lining - Improves breathability by allowing air to circulate through your clothing
  • Storm Flap - Prevents wind or rain penetrating the zip by covering the zip mechanism
  • Detachable Hood - Detachable for greater versatility. Ideal for all weather conditions
  • Adjustable Fit - Adjustable cuffs, hood and hem for a great fit
  • Zipped Pockets - For convenient and safe storage
  • 3-year warranty - Includes a 3-year warranty for guaranteed quality and peace of mind
